toolbar.ariaLabel: Sandar kayan aiki mai rukunan maɓalli

connection.offlineAria: Ana amfani da editan a yanayin ba tare da intanet ba, ma'ana kai kaɗai kake gyarawa
connection.onlineAria: Editan yana cikin yanayin haɗin gwiwa ta {type}, ma'ana zaka iya raba URL ka fara gyara tare da wasu
connection.switchOfflineAria: Kashe gyaran haɗin gwiwa kuma koma yanayin ba tare da intanet ba
connection.switchWebRTCAria: Koma gyaran haɗin gwiwa ta WebRTC
connection.switchWebSocketAria: Koma gyaran haɗin gwiwa ta WebSocket

share.downloadActiveFileInfo: Downloads only the currently open file
share.collaborationLinkTooltip: Yi fork na wannan takarda kafin amfani da wannan aiki

share.embedCodeAria: Samo lambar sakawa don kwas na yanzu a cikin edita
share.externalResourceAria: Yi amfani da URL na takardar waje don rabawa da edita
share.githubGistLinkTooltip: Dole ka fara fitar da wannan fayil zuwa GitHub Gist kafin amfani da wannan aiki
share.githubGistLinkAria: Loda kwas na LiaScript daga fitarwa ta baya zuwa GitHub Gist
share.dataUriAria: Raba kwas na yanzu a LiaScript, tare da abun ciki a cikin URL
share.fileUrlTooltip: Wannan aiki yana samuwa ne kawai idan ka raba albarkatun waje
share.downloadZip: Sauke duk aikin a matsayin fayil ZIP
share.githubGistAria: Ajiye takardar a GitHub a matsayin gist
share.githubGistTooltip: Yi fork na wannan takarda kafin amfani da wannan aiki
share.nostrAria: Raba abun ciki na yanzu a Nostr
share.nostrLinkTooltip: You have to publish this file to Nostr before you can use this functionality
share.nostrLinkAria: Load the LiaScript course from a previous Nostr publication
share.exporterAria: Send the whole project to a LiaScript Exporter to convert it to SCORM, PDF, APK, ...
share.exporterTooltip: Hand the entire project to a local or remote LiaScript Exporter for conversion
share.githubRepoFileTooltip: Open the active file as a LiaScript course from the linked GitHub repository (push your changes first). Only available for GitHub-linked projects.

modal.collaborationBody: Idan ka raba haɗin da ke ƙasa, editan zai buɗe a yanayin haɗin gwiwa. Ya kamata aiki ba tare da intanet ba ma ya yiwu, amma duk masu amfani da suka haɗu za su yi aiki a kan kwas ɗaya. Idan ka karɓi wannan ta hanyar haɗin haɗin gwiwa kuma kana son ƙirƙirar sabon kwas gaba ɗaya da kanka, sai ka danna maɓallin "Fork", wanda zai ƙirƙiri sabuwar sigar gaba ɗaya.
modal.externalResourceBody: Yi amfani da wannan URL don saita abun cikin haɗin rabawa tun da wuri. A wannan yanayin editan zai fara ƙoƙarin loda fayil ɗin Markdown ya saka abun cikinsa cikin edita. Wannan haɗin zai yi aiki ne kawai idan fayil ɗin Markdown ɗinka yana samuwa ta intanet.
modal.dataProtocolBody: Dukkan abun cikin kwas ana ɓoye shi da Base64 ko URI sannan a saka shi cikin data-URI. Saboda Base64 na iya kasa aiki ga wasu harsuna, ana kuma samar da URL mai ɓoyewar URI. Amma wannan yana aiki ne kawai ga gajerun kwasa-kwasai; idan kwas ya yi tsawo, URI ma zai yi tsawo. Idan kana raba editan ta manhajar saƙo, misali, ka fara duba cewa babu wani ɓangare da aka yanke. Haka kuma burauzoyi daban-daban suna tallafawa tsawon URL daban-daban... (Zaɓi sigar da ta fi guntu)
modal.snapshotBody: Hotunan lokaci URL ne da ke ɗauke da cikakken bayanin kwas. Amma wannan yana aiki ne kawai ga gajerun kwasa-kwasai; idan kwas ya yi tsawo, URL ma zai yi tsawo. Idan kana raba editan ta manhajar saƙo, misali, ka fara duba cewa babu wani ɓangare da aka yanke. Haka kuma burauzoyi daban-daban suna tallafawa tsawon URL daban-daban...
modal.embedBody: Kwafi wannan lambar HTML zuwa shafinka don saka kwas ɗin a matsayin misali. Za ka iya kuma canza URL da ɗaya daga cikin waɗannan don buɗe editan ko dubawa kai tsaye:

prompt.shareFileUrl: da fatan a saka URL na fayil ɗin Markdown da kake son rabawa

examples.footer: Wannan edita ne na kan layi don haɗin gwiwa ga {liascript}. Ana adana duk abun ciki ne kawai a cikin burauzarka. Nemo {templates} da za a iya sakawa ko {courses} da aka riga aka wallafa.

index.footer: Wannan edita ne na kan layi don haɗin gwiwa ga {liascript}. Ana adana duk abun ciki ne kawai a cikin burauzarka. Idan kana buƙatar wahayi, duba wasu {examples} namu, nemo {templates} da za a iya sakawa ko {courses} da aka riga aka wallafa.

import.heading: Import from
import.title: Create a new project
import.newDesc: Start with a blank document and write from scratch.
import.uploadDesc: Pick a Markdown file or a ZIP archive from your device.
import.githubDesc: Import the files of a public GitHub repository.
import.urlDesc: Load a Markdown file or ZIP archive from a web link.
import.gistDesc: Import all files of a GitHub Gist into a new project.
import.localFolderDesc: Open a folder on your computer (Chrome / Edge only).
import.githubHint: Pick the files to import on the next screen.
import.urlHint: Loads a Markdown file or a ZIP archive into a new project.
import.gistHint: Imports all files of the gist into a new project.

errors.generic: Import failed. Please check your input and try again.
errors.invalidRepo: Could not recognise a GitHub repository in that input.
errors.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid http(s) URL.
errors.invalidGist: Could not find a gist for that ID.
errors.fetchFailed: Could not load the resource. Check the URL and your connection.

card.deleteConfirm: Ka tabbata kana son share wannan takarda har abada?
card.deleteWarning: Ba za a iya dawo da ita ba!

toast.compileHint: Zaka iya gyara da haɗa wannan kwas da {ctrl}, amma idan kana son adana canje-canjenka dindindin dole ka yi fork!

toast.compileHintEmbedOnly: Zaka iya gyara da haɗa wannan kwas da {ctrl}

toast.toolbarHint: Yi amfani da sandar kayan aiki don sauyawa tsakanin yanayin edita da dubawa.

github.badCredentials: Bayanan shiga ba su dace ba, ana sake loda shafi

menu.importTooltip: Import files from a GitHub repository
menu.pushTooltip: Commit and push changes to the linked repository
menu.pullTooltip: Fetch changes from the linked repository

import.title: Import from GitHub
import.repoHint: Public repositories can be imported without a token.
import.truncated: This repository is very large; the file list was truncated by GitHub.
import.emptyRepo: This repository is empty. An empty README.md will be created to start your project.

push.title: Push to GitHub
push.remoteDrift: The repository changed on GitHub since your last sync. Consider pulling first; unchanged remote files are preserved.

pull.title: Pull from GitHub
pull.upToDate: Your project is up to date with GitHub.

pat.intro: Add a Personal Access Token (PAT) to raise the rate limit and to access private repositories or push changes.
pat.howtoToggle: How do I create a token?
pat.step2: Choose a name and an expiration, then select the repositories you want to use.
pat.step3Write: Under "Repository permissions" set "Contents" to "Read and write".
pat.step4: Generate the token, copy it and paste it below.

errors.badUrl: Please enter a valid repository (owner/repo or a GitHub URL).
errors.notFound: Repository, branch or file not found.
errors.network: Could not reach GitHub. Please check your connection.

publish.title: Publish to a new repository
publish.intro: Create a new GitHub repository and push all project files into it.

nostr.title: Raba ta Nostr
nostr.publicKeyHint: Ana amfani da maɓallinka na jama'a don gane ka a cibiyar Nostr.
nostr.privateKeyHint: Ana buƙatar maɓallinka na sirri don sa hannu da wallafa saƙonni. Ka kiyaye shi.
nostr.storeCredentials: Ajiye bayanan shiga a wannan burauzar
nostr.storeCredentialsWarning: Ajiye maɓallin sirri a burauza yana da sauƙi amma ba shi da cikakken tsaro.
nostr.relayPlaceholder: Saka sabobin relay (ɗaya a kowane layi)
nostr.relayHint: Saka sabobin relay (ɗaya a kowane layi) inda za a wallafa abun ciki.
nostr.rememberRelays: Tuna waɗannan relay don wallafe-wallafe na gaba
nostr.saveKeyWarningBody: Wannan maɓallin sirri yana ba da damar shiga shaidarka ta Nostr. Ajiye shi lafiya.
nostr.intro: Raba kwas ɗinka da al'ummar Nostr. Zaka iya wallafawa kai tsaye ko ka fara tsara wallafar.
nostr.embedMedia: Saka fayilolin midiya a matsayin data URI
nostr.embedMediaHint: Yana maida hotuna, sauti da bidiyo zuwa data URI da aka saka don sauƙin ɗauka.
nostr.messagePlaceholder: Ƙara saƙo don rakiyar wallafar Nostr ɗinka...
nostr.alertGenerateFailed: An kasa ƙirƙirar maɓallan biyu. Da fatan a sake gwadawa.
nostr.alertMissingKeys: Da fatan saka maɓallin jama'a da na sirri kafin wallafawa.
nostr.alertMissingRelay: Da fatan saka aƙalla sabar relay guda ɗaya.
nostr.alertPublishFailed: An kasa wallafawa a cibiyar Nostr. Da fatan a sake gwadawa.
nostr.alertMissingPrivateKey: Da fatan saka maɓallinka na sirri don sa hannu da wallafawa.
nostr.alertInvalidKey: Tsarin maɓallin jama'a ba daidai ba ne

buttons.heading: Take
buttons.executableCode: Lambar da za a iya gudanarwa

toolbar.noPreview: Babu dubawa ga irin wannan fayil.

exporter.title: LiaScript Exporter
exporter.urlHint: Start the exporter locally with 'liaex serve', or enter the address of a hosted exporter. The project is sent to this server and converted there.
exporter.resendTitle: Send the current project to the exporter again
exporter.handed: Project handed to the exporter. Choose a format/preset below and start the export.
exporter.errorInvalidUrl: Invalid URL. Please enter a full address, e.g. http://localhost:3000
exporter.errorMixedContent: This editor runs over HTTPS and cannot embed an insecure HTTP exporter (except localhost). Please use an HTTPS exporter URL.
exporter.errorNoHandshake: Could not reach the exporter. Make sure it is running ('liaex serve') and reachable at this URL, and that it allows being embedded.
exporter.errorNoProject: No active project found to export.
exporter.errorSend: Failed to package and send the project.

menu.syncTooltip: Compare and sync this project with the linked folder

sync.title: Synchronize with local folder
sync.inSync: Editor and folder are already in sync.

errors.permission: Access to the folder was denied. Please grant permission to continue.
